shadowrun-items-importer.title: Shadowrun Items Importer
shadowrun-items-importer.placeholder:
Paste a Shadowrun 6e item block here.

Supported in this version:
- qualities
- metamagic
- spells
- chemical toxins

Example toxin:
Narcoject
• Vector: Injection
• Speed: Immediate
• Duration: (6 – Body) hours, minimum 1 hour
• Power: 15
• Effect: Stun Damage
shadowrun-items-importer.hint.window: Initial scaffold ready. Real Ohm.js parsing is the next step.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.s: Shadowrun Items Importer is intended for the Shadowrun 6th Edition system.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.n: No item types were discovered from the active system.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.m: Paste an item block before importing.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.o: Ohm.js is not available. Include it in the module before using the parser.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.n: The parser scaffold is wired, but real Shadowrun item parsing is not implemented yet.
Enable verbose logging in the browser console.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.rememb: Store the last selected destination folder for the importer window.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.lastFo: Internal setting used to persist the last selected destination folder.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.lastTy: Internal setting used to persist the last selected item type.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.lastGe: Internal setting used to persist the last selected gear type.
Internal setting used to persist the last selected gear subtype.
shadowrun-items-importer.placeholderActo:
Paste a Shadowrun 6e NPC, Critter, or Spirit stat block here.

NPC example:
HUMANIS GOON
B A R S W L I C ESS
2 2 2 2 2 2 2 1 6
DR I/ID AC CM MOVE
2 4/1 A1, I2 9 10/15/+1
Skills: Athletics 1, Close Combat 3, Influence 1 (Intimidation +2)
Gear: Commlink (Device Rating 1)
Weapons:
Club [Club, DV 3S, Attack Ratings 6/—/—/—/—]

Critter example:
dog
B A R S W L I C ESS
3 2 3 2 2 2 3 3 6
I/ID AC CM MOVE
6/1 A1, I2 10 10/20/+3
Defense Rating: 4 (Armor: 1)
Skills: Athletics 5, Close Combat 4, Perception 5 (Smell +2)
Powers: Armor 1, Enhanced Senses (Hearing, Smell), Natural Weapon
Attack: Claws/Bite: DV 2P, Attack Ratings 5/—/—/—/—

Spirit example:
SPIRITS OF AIR
B A R S W L I C M ESS
F–2 F+3 F+4 F–3 F F F F F F
AC CM MOVE
A1, I3 (F/2)+8 5/10/+5
Initiative: [(F x 2) + 4] + 2D6
Astral Initiative: (F x 2) + 3D6
Defense Rating: F – 2
Skills: Astral, Athletics, Close Combat, Exotic Ranged Weapon, Perception
Powers: Accident, Astral Form, Concealment
Optional Powers: Elemental Attack (Cold), Energy Aura
shadowrun-items-importer.preview.placeho: Click Parse / Preview to show the recognized actor fields.
shadowrun-items-importer.preview.derived: Secondary row not found; values shown here were derived/defaulted.
shadowrun-items-importer.spirit.forceReq: Choose a numeric Force before previewing or importing a spirit.
shadowrun-items-importer.spirit.optional: This spirit can have up to {limit} optional power(s). Green powers were found in world items; black powers were not found and cannot be selected yet.
Only selected optional powers that exist as world items will be embedded into the created spirit actor.
Too many optional powers selected. Only the first {limit} will be imported.
shadowrun-items-importer.spirit.noOption: Force {force} spirits do not receive optional powers because floor(Force / 3) is 0.
